metadata.title: High Energy
metadata.album: The Best of Evelyn Thomas "High Energy"
metadata.lyrics:
[00:01.65] High energy, your love is lifting me
[00:07.97] Whoa-oh, high energy
[00:12.77] Your love is lifting me
[00:15.64] Lifting me high, oh-ah
[00:31.87] It was only last week that we first met
[00:35.27] When I was walking down the street
[00:39.78] You came up from behind me and I knew
[00:42.93] That our eyes were gonna meet
[00:47.63] That's when I fell into your arms
[00:51.38] Imagine my surprise
[00:55.06] I thought this only happened in fairy tales
[00:58.82] Love hit me right between the eyes
[01:01.97] Oh, yeah
[01:03.22] High energy, your love is lifting me
[01:09.37] Whoa-oh, high energy, yeah
[01:14.60] Your love is lifting me
[01:17.57] Lifting me high
[01:29.53] High
[01:33.66] When you call me on the phone, you make my spirit rise
[01:41.56] I'm glad the others didn't last
[01:44.91] It's a blessing in disguise
[01:49.59] Every time you're touching me
[01:53.23] It gives me such a thrill
[01:57.42] When I look deep into your eyes
[02:00.87] My heart just can't keep still, oh no
[02:05.02] High energy, your love is lifting me
[02:10.93] Whoa-oh, high energy, yeah
[02:16.44] Your love is lifting me
[02:19.33] Lifting me high
[02:31.40] High
[02:38.89] Yeah
[02:41.69] Hmm, so high
[02:51.56] All the gold that's in Fort Knox couldn't buy this happiness
[02:59.46] With your love, I don't need money
[03:03.03] I don't need success
[03:06.94] I became a victim of a sudden love attack, yeah
[03:14.54] It happened in a blink of an eye
[03:18.22] And there's no holding back, oh
[03:22.37] High energy, yeah, your love is lifting me
[03:28.58] Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa-ooh, high energy, ooh yeah
[03:33.50] Your love is lifting me
[03:36.84] Lifting me high (high energy)
[03:41.40] (Your love is lifting me)
[03:45.57] (High energy) yeah-yeah
[03:51.26]
